zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy Gilford於1340年出生在英國賀福爾時，她的父親George W Gilford25歲，母親Sarah Huldah Bradeen29歲。她於1355年之後與Richard de Burley結婚。她去世於1385年在英國英格蘭賀福爾溫斯洛享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy Gilford于1340年出生在英国賀福爾时，她的父亲George W Gilford25岁，母亲Sarah Huldah Bradeen29岁。她于1355年之后与Richard de Burley结婚。她去世于1385年在英国英格兰賀福爾溫斯洛享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gilford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Guilford
meanings: English: habitational name from Guildford in Surrey, which is probably named with Old English gylde ‘golden’ (perhaps used here to denote a sandy hill) + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy Gilford was born in 1340, in Herefordshire, England, her father, George W Gilford, was 25 and her mother, Sarah Huldah Bradeen, was 29. She married Richard de Burley after 1355. She died in 1385, in Winslow, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy Gilford est née en 1340, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, George W Gilford, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Sarah Huldah Bradeen, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Burley après 1355. Elle est décédée en 1385, à Winslow, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy Gilford 1340 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George W Gilford 25 und ihre Mutter Sarah Huldah Bradeen 29. Sie hat nach 1355 Richard de Burley geheiratet. Sie starb 1385 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Winslow, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Gilford è nata il nel 1340 nel Herefordshire, England, sua padre, George W Gilford, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Sarah Huldah Bradeen, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Burley dopo il 1355. Morì nel 1385, nel Winslow, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy Gilfordが1340年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父George W Gilfordは25歳，母Sarah Huldah Bradeenは29歳であった。1355年以後にRichard de Burleyと結婚した。彼女は1385年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィンスロウで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Gilford(이)가 1340년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George W Gilford(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Huldah Bradeen(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1355년 이후 Richard de Burley(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 윈슬로에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Gilford nasceu em 1340, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, George W Gilford, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Huldah Bradeen, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Burley após 1355. Ela faleceu em 1385, em Winslow, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy Gilford родилась в 1340 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени George W Gilford было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Huldah Bradeen, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Burley после 1355 г. Она умерла в 1385 г. в местности винслоу, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy Gilford nació en 1340, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, George W Gilford, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Sarah Huldah Bradeen, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Richard de Burley después de 1355. Murió en 1385, en Winslow, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
